mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NUNGIL_USER (id, idx, special_note, white_list) VALUES (#{id}, #{idx}, #{specialNote,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{whiteList,jdbcType=CLOB})
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(idx), 0) + 1 FROM NUNGIL_USER WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM NUNGIL_USER WHERE id = #{id} ORDER BY idx
SELECT * FROM NUNGIL_USER WHERE id = #{id} AND idx = #{idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE NUNGIL_USER SET white_list = #{whiteList} WHERE id = #{id} AND idx = #{idx}
UPDATE NUNGIL_USER SET special_note = #{specialNote} WHERE id = #{id} AND idx = #{idx}
UPDATE NUNGIL_USER SET user_name = #{userName}, user_phone = #{userPhone} WHERE id = #{id} AND idx = #{idx}
UPDATE NUNGIL_USER SET fcm_token = #{fcmToken} WHERE id = #{id} AND idx = #{idx}
